description_long: This is a modern, expansive house set within a walled property, surrounded by landscaped greenery and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof design with multiple levels and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for abundant natural light. The exterior combines light-colored plaster, wood paneling, and glass, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. There is a spacious driveway leading to a covered garage, as well as a separate circular pavilion or gazebo structure in the yard. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes paved walkways, patios, and outdoor seating areas. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and privacy within an urban neighborhood context.
description: A large, modern house with flat roofs, extensive glass windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a fence. The design features open spaces, a driveway, and a separate pavilion structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, and the circular pavilion on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the main building's layered structure with visible patios.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, multiple windows, and the house's elongated layout with outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional patios, the rear of the pavilion, and more of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a minimal overhang, flanked by large glass panels and accessed via a paved path from the driveway.
